Off Calendar May-18-2018 Continued To Jul-12-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action For Minor
Off Calendar Apr-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action of the Minors Andrew Lopez and Emanuel Lopez.
Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Brendan D. S. Way, Esq. and Randall H. Scarlett, Esq. appeared with petitioners Mark Donnelly and Pedro Luis Lopez, who were present as Guardians ad Litem for the minors Andrew Lopez and Emanuel Lopez, respectively. Neither minor was present for this morning's proceedings.
Petitioners were placed under oath and testified.
Orders appointing Messrs. Donnelly and Lopez as Guardians ad Litem for the minors were filed on March 28, 2018.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petitions are granted and the compromises are approved as follows:

Emanuel Lopez:
Settlement Amount - $83,333.33.
Attorney Fees - $20,833.33.
Medical Lien - $4,333.33.
Costs - 500.00.

Andrew Lopez:
Settlement Amount - $83,333.33.
Attorney Fees - $20,833.33.
Medical Lien - $4,333.33.
Costs - 500.00.

The net balance of $57,666.67 for each minor shall be used for the purchase of a Single Premium Annuity (for each minor) with Pacific Life & Annuity.

Orders Approving the Compromise of the Pending Actions of the Minors were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to May 24, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Status of the purchase of the Single Premium Annuities.

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action For Minor
Off Calendar Apr-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
